ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the district is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area_km2" INTEGER /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate type of the district */,
  "agricultural_land_km2" INTEGER /* Area of agricultural land in the district in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the district was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the district information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the market is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the market */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the market */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market (e.g., wholesale, retail) */,
  "total_stalls" INTEGER /* Total number of stalls in the market */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the market */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the market was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the market information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markets_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "commodity_name" TEXT /* Name of the commodity */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the commodity (e.g., Grains, Pulses) */,
  "seasonality" TEXT /* Seasonality of the commodity (e.g., year-round, seasonal) */,
  "storage_requirements" TEXT /* Storage requirements for the commodity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the commodity was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the commodity information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "varieties" (
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variety */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity the variety belongs to */,
  "variety_name" TEXT /* Name of the variety */,
  "yield" INTEGER /* Average yield of the variety */,
  "disease_resistance" TEXT /* Information about the variety's resistance to diseases */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the variety was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the variety information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_varieties_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade */,
  "weight_requirement" INTEGER /* Weight requirement for the grade */,
  "quality_standard" TEXT /* Quality standard for the grade */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the grade was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the grade information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_data" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price data entry */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market where the price data is collected */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variety of the commodity */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grade of the commodity */,
  "min_price" INTEGER /* Minimum price of the commodity in Rs./Quintal */,
  "max_price" INTEGER /* Maximum price of the commodity in Rs./Quintal */,
  "modal_price" INTEGER /* Modal price of the commodity in Rs./Quintal */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the commodity sold */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., manual entry, API) */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the price data has been verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the price data was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the price data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES varieties ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data entry, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the price data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the price data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES price_data ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
